description: Counterparty shortens the initial term to accommodate a school-year calendar. This is a listed acceptable_variation in the term-length topic ('1 to 7 years'); no hard_rejection rule applies to the term-length topic today, so there is no detector to hook, but this exercises the ACCEPT / acceptable_variation gold-case category per issue #183.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: The initial term of this Agreement shall be 3 years from the Effective Date, subject to renewal as set forth in Section 2.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'Counterparty shortens initial term' -> '1 to 7 years'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
